title: ancistrolobus formosus
intro: Ancistrolobus formosus, also known as the Formosa yew, is a species of flowering plant in the yew family, Taxaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ancistrolobus formosus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain diseases, such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Ancistrolobus formosus is often prepared into herbal decoctions or infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and gastrointestinal issues.
